DeletePluginDescription: This plugin will no longer be available to {{productName}} users. Are you sure you want to continue?
PluginCacheWarningDescription: Plugins are cached based on their version number. To ensure your changes are applied, please increment the version number in your <1>package.json</1> file before uploading. The system will not update a plugin if the version remains the same
PluginIsNotCompatible: The plugin SDK version doesn’t match the {{productName}} version. Please update to a compatible version.
PluginSDKDescription: Using Plugin SDK you can extend your {{productName}} functionality, connect the third-party services or enhance the existing user experience. Here you can find the plugin samples with code source available on GitHub.
PluginSDKInstruction: Click the button for the detailed instructions on how to create your own plugins.
UploadDescription: You can add plugins to extend the functionality of {{productName}} with extra features. Click Upload plugin or drop file in the ZIP archive.
